Signed patch bundle (bundleVersion 18, minApp 1.2.0). Update via the app's "Update patches" button — no app reinstall needed.

## Changelog
- **New — Hide blocked users' messages (Messages):** removes messages from people on your blocklist from
  chat history, at the wire level. It reacts immediately when you block or unblock someone (no need to
  reopen the blocked list first).
- Every patch now has a short, one-line description.
